summary: Design and implement a Python script to monitor the health of a 3-node system by pinging each node and reporting their status.

research_tasks.task: Investigate Python libraries suitable for sending ICMP echo requests (ping) to network nodes.
Analyze the requirements for the health check script, including how to handle different node statuses and report them effectively.
Design the overall structure of the Python script, including functions for pinging nodes and reporting results.

implementation_tasks.task: Implement the Python script with functions to ping each of the three nodes and record their responses.
Develop the reporting functionality to display or log the status of each node after the ping operation.
Test the script in a controlled environment to ensure it accurately detects and reports the status of each node.

verification_criteria: The script successfully pings all three nodes and reports their status accurately.
The script handles node failures gracefully and provides clear error messages.
The output is readable and includes timestamps for each ping operation.
